name: genouk
description: Genouk AI Assistant for prompt engineering and review

commands.title: Genouk: Sync TODOs in Active File to Linear

genouk.vultrApiKey.description: Fallback Vultr Serverless Inference API key. Prefer the "Genouk: Set API Key" command, which stores it in the OS keychain instead of plaintext settings.
genouk.vultrApiKey.markdownDescription: **Fallback only** — prefer the **Genouk: Set API Key** command (stored securely in the OS keychain). Get a key from the [Vultr Inference dashboard](https://my.vultr.com/inference/). When set, Vultr is the primary provider.

genouk.vultrModel.description: Vultr inference model id (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Flash). Leave blank to use the VULTR_MODEL env var or the built-in default.

genouk.groqApiKey.description: Fallback Groq API key. Prefer the "Genouk: Set API Key" command, which stores it in the OS keychain instead of plaintext settings.
genouk.groqApiKey.markdownDescription: **Fallback only** — prefer the **Genouk: Set API Key** command (stored securely in the OS keychain). Get a free key at [console.groq.com/keys](https://console.groq.com/keys)

genouk.model.description: Groq model used for prompt and change review.

genouk.geminiApiKey.description: Fallback Gemini API key (used when Groq is rate-limited). Prefer the "Genouk: Set API Key" command, which stores it securely.
genouk.geminiApiKey.markdownDescription: **Fallback only** — prefer the **Genouk: Set API Key** command (stored securely in the OS keychain). Get a free key at [aistudio.google.com/apikey](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)

genouk.geminiModel.description: Gemini model used as the fallback (gemini-2.0-flash is free and fast).

genouk.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens the model may use for a single review response.

genouk.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for reviews. Lower is more focused and deterministic.

genouk.linearApiKey.description: Fallback Linear Personal API Key. Prefer the "Genouk: Set API Key" command, which stores it securely.
genouk.linearApiKey.markdownDescription: **Fallback only** — prefer the **Genouk: Set API Key** command (stored securely in the OS keychain). Generate one at [linear.app/settings/api](https://linear.app/settings/api).

genouk.linearTeamId.description: Your Linear Team ID (or Team Key, e.g., ENG) where tasks will be created.
